name: sofiatraffic-schedules
description: A tool designed to take Sofia public transit schedules and convert them into machine readeble format..

scripts.build-schedules: node scripts/00-prep.js && node scripts/01-download.js && node scripts/02-stops.js && node scripts/03-routes.js && node scripts/04-schedules.js && node scripts/05-filter-stops.js
scripts.build-github: npx parcel build ./src/index.html --public-url https://dimitar5555.github.io/sofiatraffic-schedules/ && npm run build-sitemap && cp ./src/robots.txt ./dist

author: Dimitar5555
